zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Gordon於1443年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利時，她的父親Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly33歲，母親Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly33歲。她於1461年11月15日與Nicholas Hay 2nd Earl of Erroll結婚。她去世於1500年4月17日在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾享年57歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏帕爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Gordon was born in 1443, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly, was 33 and her mother, Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, was 33. She married Nicholas Hay 2nd Earl of Erroll on 15 November 1461. She died on 17 April 1500, in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, at the age of 57, and was buried in Cupar, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Gordon est née en 1443, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Hay 2nd Earl of Erroll le 15 novembre 1461. Elle est décédée le 17 avril 1500, à Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Cupar, Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Gordon 1443 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly 33 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly 33. Sie hat am 15. November 1461 Nicholas Hay 2nd Earl of Erroll geheiratet. Sie starb am 17. April 1500 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich und wurde in Cupar, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Gordon è nata il nel 1443 nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Hay 2nd Earl of Erroll il 15 novembre 1461. Morì il 17 aprile 1500, nel Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Cupar, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Gordonが1443年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntlyは33歳，母Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntlyは33歳であった。1461年11月15日にNicholas Hay 2nd Earl of Errollと結婚した。彼女は1500年4月17日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルアルペス-デ-ハウテ-プローベンスフォーカルクイエルで57歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフクウパーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Gordon(이)가 1443년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1461년 11월 15일 Nicholas Hay 2nd Earl of Erroll(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1500년 4월 17일 프랑스 플로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 알페스-데-하테-플로븐스 포캘키어에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 쿠업아르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Gordon nasceu em 1443, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Hay 2nd Earl of Erroll em 15 de novembro de 1461. Ela faleceu em 17 de abril de 1500, em Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Cupar, Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Gordon родилась в 1443 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Hay 2nd Earl of Erroll 15 ноября 1461 г. Она умерла 17 апреля 1500 г. в местности форкалкуиир, алпес-де-хауте-провенс, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности купар, фиф, Шотландия.
